stages.concept:
# Unit 159: 평서문의 화법전환 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **평서문의 화법전환**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **직접화법** — 말한 그대로 인용부호(" ")로 표현
**간접화법** — 전달자의 입장에서 바꿔 표현

> 직접: He **said**, "I **am** happy."
> 간접: He **said** (that) he **was** happy.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 전환 규칙:

👩‍🏫 선생님: 1) **전달동사**: said → said (that) / said to me → told me

👩‍🏫 선생님: 2) **인칭 변환**: I → he/she, my → his/her, we → they

👩‍🏫 선생님: 3) **시제 변환** (주절이 과거일 때):

> am/is → was, are → were
> do/does → did, will → would
> can → could, have → had

👩‍🏫 선생님: 4) **부사 변환**:

> today → that day, yesterday → the day before
> tomorrow → the next day, now → then
> here → there, this → that, ago → before

👩‍🏫 선생님: 예시:

> 직접: She **said to me**, "I **will call** you **tomorrow**."
> 간접: She **told me** (that) she **would call** me **the next day**.

**Q. 다음 직접화법 문장을 간접화법으로 바르게 고친 것을 고르세요.**
직접화법: He said to me, "I can help you tomorrow."
1. He told me that he could help me tomorrow.
2. He told me that he can help me the next day.
3. He told me that he could help me the next day. ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 완벽해요!
'said to me'는 'told me'로, 주절이 과거이므로 'can'은 'could'로 시제를 일치시키고, 시간부사 'tomorrow'는 'the next day'로 모두 알맞게 변환한 3번이 정답입니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 인칭, 시제, 부사를 바꿔주면 되는 거군요! 규칙을 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 159: 평서문의 화법전환 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 직접화법을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He said, "I am happy."
→ He said that he (     ) happy.
> **정답** was

---

**02.** She said, "I will come tomorrow."
→ She said that she (     ) come the next day.
> **정답** would

---

**03.** He said, "I like this book."
→ He said that he (     ) that book.
> **정답** liked

---

**04.** She said to me, "I can help you."
→ She told me that she (     ) help me.
> **정답** could

---

**05.** He said, "I have finished my homework."
→ He said that he (     ) finished his homework.
> **정답** had

---

**06.** 직접화법을 간접화법으로 바꾸시오.
He said, "I am tired."
> **정답** He said that he was tired.

---

**07.** She said, "I will go to the store."
> **정답** She said that she would go to the store.

---

**08.** He said to me, "I like your bag."
> **정답** He told me that he liked my bag.

---

**09.** She said, "I can swim well."
> **정답** She said that she could swim well.

---

**10.** He said, "I have read the book."
> **정답** He said that he had read the book.

---

**11.** 간접화법을 직접화법으로 바꾸시오.
He said that he was hungry.
> **정답** He said, "I am hungry."

---

**12.** She told me that she would help me.
> **정답** She said to me, "I will help you."

---

**13.** He said that he liked the movie.
> **정답** He said, "I like the movie."

---

**14.** She said that she could play the piano.
> **정답** She said, "I can play the piano."

---

**15.** He told me that he had visited Seoul.
> **정답** He said to me, "I have visited Seoul."

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 피곤하다고 말했다. (간접화법)
He that said he was tired
> **정답** He / said / that / he / was / tired

---

**17.** 그녀는 나에게 도와주겠다고 말했다. (간접화법)
She me told that she would help me
> **정답** She / told / me / that / she / would / help / me

---

**18.** 그는 그 영화를 좋아한다고 말했다. (간접화법)
He that said he liked the movie
> **정답** He / said / that / he / liked / the / movie

---

**19.** 그녀는 수영을 잘한다고 말했다. (간접화법)
She that said she could swim well
> **정답** She / said / that / she / could / swim / well

---

**20.** 그는 숙제를 끝냈다고 말했다. (간접화법)
He that said he had finished his homework
> **정답** He / said / that / he / had / finished / his / homework
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 159: 평서문의 화법전환 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
She said to me, "I need your help."
→ She told me that _________ _________ my help.
she needed
I need
she needs
I needed
> **정답** she needed

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
He says, "I was glad to help you."
→ He says that _________ _________glad to help me.
he is
he was
I was
he had been
> **정답** he was

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
David told her that he hadn't met Chris for two years.
→ David said to her, "_________ _________ Chris for
two years.
I hadn't met
he met
he haven't met
I haven't met
> **정답** I haven't met

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
He said that he was interested in history.
→ He said, "_________ _________ interested in
history."
He was
He is
I am
I was
> **정답** I am

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Jane says to him, "I did it for you."
→ Jane __________ him that __________ did it for
__________.
says - I - her
tells - she - him
tells - I - her
says - she - him
> **정답** tells - she - him

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She said to me, "I don't have enough money to buy
the bag."
→ She ________ me that ________ ________ enough
money to buy the bag.
told - she - didn't have
said to - I - don't have
told - I - didn't have
said to - she - didn't have
> **정답** told - she - didn't have

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
They told him that they hadn't finished their work yet.
→ They ___________ him, "We ______________ our
work yet.
told - haven't finished
said to - haven't finished
said to - don't finish
told - didn't finished
> **정답** said to - haven't finished

---

**08.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Paul said to his mom, "I am in the school."
→ Paul said his mom that she is in the school.
told - he - was
told to - I - was
say to - he - am
say - he - am
> **정답** told - he - was

---

**09.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
James said to her, "I have watched the movie twice."
→ James said her that I have watched the movie
twice.
told - he - had watched
told - he - have watched
told - I - have watched
said - I - watched
> **정답** told - he - had watched

---

**10.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
She said to me, "I called you an hour ago."
She said me that I called you an hour before.
said to - she - have called - you
told - I - had called - me
said - she - had called - you
told - she - had called - me
> **정답** told - she - had called - me

---

**11.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
He told her that he had waited for her for an hour
there.
→ He told her, "I had waited for you for an hour
there."
told - had waited - here
said to - had waited - there
said to - waited - here
told - waited - there
> **정답** said to - waited - here

---

**12.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
They said that they would discuss that issue the
following day.
→ They told, "We would discuss that issue the
following day."
told - will discuss - tomorrow
told - would discuss - tomorrow
said - would discuss - tomorrow
said - will discuss - tomorrow
> **정답** said - will discuss - tomorrow

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom이 그녀에게 말했다. "나는 어제 여기에서 Paul을
만났어."
Tom told her, "I met Paul here the previous
day."
Tom said to her, "I met Paul here yesterday."
Tom said to her, "I met Paul here the previous
day."
Tom told her, "I met Paul here yesterday."
> **정답** Tom said to her, "I met Paul here yesterday."

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 말했다. "나는 지난 일요일에 자전거를 잃어버렸어."
He said, "I lost my bicycle last Sunday."
He told, "I lost my bicycle last Sunday."
He said, "I had lost my bicycle last Sunday."
He told, "I had lost my bicycle last Sunday."
> **정답** He said, "I lost my bicycle last Sunday."

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 나에게 지금 떠나려고 한다고 말했다.
She told me that she was going to leave then.
She told me that she is going to leave now.
She said me that she was going to leave then.
She said me that she was going to leave now.
> **정답** She told me that she was going to leave then.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
내일 고객과 중요한 미팅이 있다고 그가 나에게 말했다.
He said me that he had an important meeting
with his client tomorrow.
He told me that he will have an important
meeting with his client the following day.
He told me that he had an important meeting
with his client tomorrow.
He told me that he had an important meeting
with his client the following day.
> **정답** He told me that he had an important meeting with his client the following day.

---

**17.** 다음 중 화법 전환이 잘못된 것을 고르시오.
John said to her, "I have something to tell you
now."
→ John told her that he has something to tell
her now.
Sophia said to him, "I don't want to go to
school."
→ Sophia told him that she didn't want to go
to school.
She said to her friend, "We played tennis
yesterday."
→ She told her friend that they had played
tennis the day before.
She said to her friend, "I have just had lunch."
→ She told her friend that she had just had
lunch.
> **정답** John said to her, "I have something to tell you now."
→ John told her that he has something to tell her
now.

---

**18.** 다음 중 화법 전환이 잘못된 것을 고르시오.
She said to him, "I will go to America to study
next Sunday.
→ She told him that she would go to America
to study the following Sunday.
He said to us, "She is expected to arrive here
soon."
→ He told us that she was expected to arrive
there soon.
He said to her, "We need to change this plan
now."
→ He told her that they need to change this
plan now.
She said to me, "I have read this book a few
times."
→ She told me that she had read that book a
few times.
> **정답** He said to her, "We need to change this plan now."
→ He told her that they need to change this plan
now.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
He says, "I will visit my grandparents in Busan."
→ He says that I will visit
his grandparents in Busan.
> **정답** says, he, will, his

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
She says to me, "I want to raise a dog at home."
→ She says to me that she
wants to raise a dog at home.
> **정답** tells, she, wants
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 159 평서문의 화법전환중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
He said to them, "You have to leave today."
→ He  (     )  them 
.
정답 told, that they had to leave that day (they had to leave that day)
leave that day)

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
Sarah said to me, "I can go to the movies with you."
→ Sarah  (     )  me
.
정답 told, that she could go to the movies with me

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
She says, "My father helps me with my homework."
→ She  (     )  that 
.
정답 says, her father helps her with her homework

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
Jake tells me that his brothers are going to join my
club.
→ Jake  (     )  me, "
."
정답 says to, My brothers are going to join your club

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
Emily said that her parents would come home the
next day.
→ Emily  (     ) , " 
."
정답 said, My parents will come home tomorrow

---

**06.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오. (간접화법)
그 소년은 그 남자를 보았다고 말했다.
힌트 (     ) see the man
The boy said  (     ) .
정답 that he had seen the man (that he saw the man)

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오. (직접화법)
Tom는 말했다. "나는 지난 토요일에 야구 연습을 했어."
힌트 (     ) practice baseball
Tom said, "  (     )  last Saturday."
정답 I practiced baseball

---

**08.** 다음 화법전환에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
My brother said to me, "I did not watch TV last
night."
→ My brother told me that
he did not watch TV (     )  the previous
night.
정답 he had not watched TV

---

**09.** 다음 화법전환에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
He said to me, "You have to prepare for the
presentation today."
→ He told me that
I have to prepare for the present .
정답 I had to prepare for the presentation that day

---

**10.** 다음 화법전환에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
Peter said that his brother had gone to America
two months before.
→ Peter said, " His brother had gone to America
."
정답 My brother went to America two months ago

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 159: 평서문의 화법전환 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He said to me, "I need your advice.
" → He told me that _________ _________ my advice. he needed I need he needs I needed
> 정답: he needed

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She says, "I was happy to see you.
" → She says that _________ _________ happy to see me. she is she was I was she had been
> 정답: she was

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy told him that she hadn't visited Tom for three months.
→ Amy said to him, "_________ _________ Tom for three months." I hadn't visited she visited she haven't visited I haven't visited
> 정답: I haven't visited

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She said that she was interested in music.
→ She said, "_________ _________ interested in music." She was She is I am I was
> 정답: I am

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom says to her, "I did it for you.
" → Tom __________ her that __________ did it for __________.
says - I - her tells - he - her tells - I - her says - he - her
> 정답: tells - he - her

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He said to me, "I don't have enough time to finish the project.
" → He ________ me that ________ ________ enough time to finish the project.
told - he - didn't have said to - I - don't have told - I - didn't have said to - he - didn't have
> 정답: told - he - didn't have

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
They told her that they hadn't completed their assignment yet.
→ They ___________ her, "We ______________ our assignment yet." told - haven't completed said to - haven't completed said to - don't complete told - didn't completed
> 정답: said to - haven't completed

---

**08.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린 곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Amy said to her dad, "I am in the library.
" → Amy said her dad that she is in the library. told - she - was told to - I - was say to - she - am say - she - am
> 정답: told - she - was

---

**09.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린 곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Tom said to her, "I have finished the report already.
" → Tom said her that I have finished the report already. told - he - had finished told - he - have finished told - I - have finished said - I - finished
> 정답: told - he - had finished

---

**10.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린 곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
He said to me, "I texted you an hour ago.
